title: Rubindum
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Citation}}
'''Rubindum''' [[Ore/Legends|ore]] was a type of [[Mineral/Legends|mineral]] integral to the construction of [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] [[Hyperdrive motivator/Legends|engines]].

==History==
While serving aboard the [[Rand Ecliptic/Legends|''Rand Ecliptic'']], [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs Darklighter]] and [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek Klivian]] were assigned to deliver a shipment of rubindum ore to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Naval]] [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyard]] in the [[Bestine system/Legends|Bestine system]]. Instead of locating the shipyard personnel, Darklighter and Klivian sought out Klivian's friend [[Lindy]], who put them in touch with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], to whom they hoped to defect.

While attempting to escape [[Bestine IV/Legends|Bestine IV]] in the stolen ''Ecliptic'', Darklighter dumped half of the shipment of rubindum into the path of pursuing [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. The rubindum created a small-scale [[asteroid field]]. Few of the [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]] were able to evade the lethal ore, allowing the ''Ecliptic'', its fugitive crew, and the remainder of the valuable ore to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] en route to a new life with the Rebellion.

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]'' refers to the mineral as rubindun.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''
